nasb.text: I set a snare for you and you were also caught, O Babylon, While you yourself were not aware; You have been found and also seized Because you have engaged in conflict with the Lord.”

esv.text: I set a snare for you and you were taken, O Babylon, and you did not know it; you were found and caught, because you opposed the Lord.

cnv.text: “巴比倫哪！我設下網羅捉拿你， 你被捉住，仍不自覺； 你被發現，也被抓住， 因為你和耶和華爭鬥。”

ccb.text: 巴比伦啊，我给你设下了陷阱， 你在懵然不知中被捉住， 因为你与耶和华为敌。
